data.body: PASS-1 review (T1 — prior-art / novel-architecture overlay): no findings. No bright-line fires for Cluster 2 — it is a pure in-file refactor (collapse two duplicated jittered-backoff functions into one parameterized helper) with no external integration, new dependency, security/auth surface, performance target, or migration. The plan explicitly forbids introducing a universal retry() helper or new _retry.py module, deliberately avoiding novel architecture. The duplication-elimination + parameterized-helper approach is a well-trodden pattern requiring no prior-art search. T1 is not-applicable here → PASS.
